name: Tempeh Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 piece tempeh, about the size of a
chopped onions and mushrooms (with or without)
tomato slices/other raw veggies as desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in pans (you can use one pan if preferred). Sauté onions and mushrooms until done, then set aside.
2. Fry tempeh on both sides. When nearly cooked, add a teaspoon of soy sauce to each side and flip to finish cooking (it may splatter).
3. Toast bread and spread mayo generously on both slices.
4. Assemble the sandwich with bread, tempeh, tomato, onion/mushroom mixture, and other veggies if desired. Serve hot.
Difficulty: easy
Precision: approximate measurements
